sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) pleasantness, Pro 3:17 אִמְרֵי נֹעַם pleasant, i.e. suitable, becoming words, Pro 15:26 16:24 .

(2) beauty, brightness; נֹעַם יְהֹוָה glory of Jehovah, Psa 27:3 comp. טוּב יְהֹוָה verse 13 Psa 27:13 Exo 33:19.

(3) grace, favour, Psa 90:17 Zec 11:7 (compare χάρις, gratia; Germ, Huld, from the word hold).
